What We Offer

Our Roofing Services

Professional solutions for all your roofing needs, delivered with expertise and care.

Roof Repair

Fast, reliable repairs for leaks, damaged shingles, and flashing issues. We fix it right the first time.

Learn More

Roof Replacement

Complete roof replacement with premium materials and expert installation. Built to last decades.

Learn More

Emergency Leak Repair

24/7 emergency service for sudden leaks and storm damage. We respond within hours, not days.

Learn More

Roof Inspection

Comprehensive inspections to identify issues before they become costly problems. Free estimates.

Learn More

Storm Damage Repair

Expert storm damage assessment and repair. We work with your insurance company directly.

Learn More

Tile Roofing

Beautiful, durable tile roof installation and repair. Perfect for California's climate.

Learn More

Shingle Roofing

Quality asphalt shingle roofs in various styles and colors. Affordable and reliable.

Learn More

Gutter Services

Gutter installation, repair, and cleaning to protect your home from water damage.

Learn More

Skylight Services

Professional skylight installation, repair, and replacement for natural light and ventilation.

Learn More

Need Urgent Repairs?

Soft Credit Pull - Won't affect your score

Get financing with OC roofing expertise

Roofing Materials

Roofing Types We Specialize In

Expert installation for all roofing materials with manufacturer-backed warranties.

Asphalt Shingles

Most popular choice for affordability and versatility

  • 20-30 year lifespan
  • Wide color selection
  • Cost-effective
Learn More

Clay & Concrete Tile

Classic Mediterranean style with exceptional durability

  • 50+ year lifespan
  • Fire resistant
  • Energy efficient
Learn More

Metal Roofing

Modern look with unmatched longevity

  • 40-70 year lifespan
  • Weather resistant
  • Low maintenance
Learn More

Flat Roof Systems

Perfect for modern and commercial properties

  • TPO, PVC, Modified Bitumen
  • Excellent drainage
  • Durable
Learn More
Why Choose Us

The S NEW ROOF Difference

We're not just roofers, we're your neighbors committed to protecting your home

Family Owned & Operated

Local family business treating every home like our own since 2010.

Fully Licensed & Insured

CA CSLB licensed with comprehensive liability and workers comp insurance.

On-Time, Every Time

We respect your time. Projects start and end on schedule.

Written Warranties

Up to 30-year manufacturer warranties plus our workmanship guarantee.

Transparent Pricing

No hidden fees. Detailed quotes with itemized costs upfront.

Direct Communication

Speak directly with your project manager, not a call center.

🏠 Locally Owned & Operated

Your Neighbors, Your Roofers

We're not some big corporate chain. We're a local family business proudly serving all communities throughout Orange and LA County. When you call S NEW ROOF, you're calling a neighbor who genuinely cares about protecting your home.

Serving Orange & LA County

Our team knows the local building codes, weather patterns, and what works best for California homes throughout Orange and LA County.

Community Partners

We support local communities, schools, and volunteer throughout Orange and LA County. Giving back is part of who we are.

2,500+ Local Families Served

Your neighbors trust us. From historic homes to new builds throughout Orange and LA County, we've worked on homes just like yours.

Local Business Network

Active member of local Chambers of Commerce and Better Business Bureau with an A+ rating.

We're Just Around the Corner

No matter where you are in Orange or LA County, we can be at your door quickly for inspections and emergency repairs.

Call Us: (714) 770-4756
Downtown Santa Ana5 min
South Coast Plaza10 min
Anaheim Stadium15 min
Irvine Spectrum20 min
Huntington Beach25 min
Newport Coast25 min

“I started this company to help my neighbors protect their homes. Every roof we work on is treated like it's my own family's home. That's the S NEW ROOF promise.”

— Samuel, Owner & Founder

Serving Orange & LA County Since 2010

Insurance Claims

Storm Damage? We Handle Your Insurance Claim

Dealing with insurance companies can be overwhelming. Our experienced team works directly with your insurance provider to ensure you get the coverage you deserve.

We work with all major insurance carriers

State Farm, Allstate, Farmers, USAA, and more

No out-of-pocket expense until claim is approved

We wait for insurance payment before collecting

We handle all the paperwork

Documentation, photos, and claim submissions

Start Your ClaimCall Now

Our Insurance Process

1

Free Storm Damage Inspection

Our certified inspectors document all damage with photos and detailed reports.

2

File Your Claim

We help you navigate the insurance claim process and handle paperwork.

3

Meet With Adjuster

We meet with your insurance adjuster to ensure all damage is properly documented.

4

Complete Repairs

Once approved, we complete all repairs to pre-storm condition or better.

Customer Reviews

Trusted By Homeowners

See what our satisfied customers have to say about our roofing services.

Roof Leak Repair
15

“We were worried when we saw water stains on our ceiling. S NEW ROOF came out the same day, found the leak quickly, and fixed everything - including the interior damage. They were professional, clean, and the repair is invisible. Highly recommend!”

Tom and Anna

Orange County, CA
Shingle Roof Installation
10

“S NEW ROOF transformed our home! The team was professional, clean, and finished ahead of schedule. Our new roof looks absolutely stunning and we've already noticed a difference in our energy bills. Highly recommend!”

Brett Ohls & Lorraine

Santa Ana, CA
Great price · $1–2,000

“Wonderful job with professional staff with good pricing. Helped us replace and repair over 55 broken tiles on our roof. Were able to work same day of quote and stayed until job was done. Would highly recommend.”

Roof repairRoof installationRoof damage repair

Amir Ghobrial

Residential Customer

“Amazing work from Samuel owner at S New Roof!!! Listen to all my needs from the 1st appointment to when he completed my home. Very professional and clean. Will recommend to my friends and family!!”

Roof Installation

Alonso Damian

Homeowner

“I couldn't be happier with the work S New Roof did on my home. From start to finish, the entire process was smooth and stress-free. The team was professional, punctual, and detail-oriented. They kept me informed every step of the way, worked efficiently, and the finished roof looks fantastic.”

Full Roof Replacement

Mush Bek

Homeowner

“Samuel and his team did an amazing job with my roof repair! Fantastic work replacing the damaged wood - everything looks brand new now. Great price and top-quality workmanship. Highly recommend!”

Roof Repair

Brian Nguyen

Homeowner

“I had an emergency leak late at night during a big storm. S New Roof was there in less than an hour and took care of everything. They have done extensive repairs and maintenance. S New Roof is by far the best roofing company I've worked with!”

Storm damage repairRoof installation

Our Guarantees

Warranties You Can Trust

We back our work with industry-leading warranties for your complete peace of mind.

100% Covered

10-Year Workmanship Guarantee

We stand behind every nail we drive. If there's any issue with our workmanship, we'll fix it at no cost to you.

Transferable

30-Year Manufacturer Warranty

Premium materials backed by industry-leading manufacturer warranties. Your investment is protected for decades.

No Questions

Satisfaction Guarantee

Your satisfaction is our priority. We're not happy until you're thrilled with your new roof.

Peace of Mind

Lifetime Leak Protection

Our roofs are built to last. We guarantee no leaks for the lifetime of the warranty period.

See Our Warranty Details

Full warranty documentation available on request

Certified by Top Manufacturers

Our certifications mean you get the best warranties and workmanship

How It Works

Simple, straightforward process from inspection to completion.

01

Schedule Free Inspection

Book your free roof inspection online or by phone. Same-day appointments available.

02

Roof Assessment

Our expert conducts a thorough inspection and provides a detailed report with recommendations.

03

Professional Installation

Our certified team completes your roofing project with premium materials and expert craftsmanship.

04

Enjoy Peace of Mind

Rest easy knowing your home is protected by a durable roof backed by our warranty.
